About Me

A bit about Perran...

My name is Perran Moon, I have been the Member of Parliament for Camborne, Redruth and Hayle since July 2024.

I was born and raised in Redruth. My dad was a GP in the local area.

Before Parliament, I worked primarily in the Electric Vehicle sector for companies like Renault, Nissan, Autotrader, Manheim, ZapMap and Believ.

I also have had experience working in local government prior to my nomination as a candidate in the 2024 general election.

© 2026 Perran Moon MP
